title: SolarEdge Technologies Q3 2021 Earnings Preview
text: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q3 2021 Earnings Preview. Earnings Estimates: The consensus EPS Estimate is 1.38 (+14.0% Y/Y) and the consensus Revenue Estimate is 529.24 million (+56.5% Y/Y). Company Guidance: For Q3, SolarEdge sees revenues of 520 million-540 million compared with 529.24 million analyst consensus, and non-GAAP gross margin of 32%-34%. Additionally, the company forecasts Q3 revenues from the solar segment of 460 million-480 million, and segment gross margin of 35%-37%. Historical Beat Rate: Over the last 2 years, SEDG has beaten EPS estimates 75% of the time and has beaten revenue estimates 88% of the time. Analyst Sentiment: Over the last 3 months, EPS estimates have seen 11 upward revisions and 4 downward. Revenue estimates have seen 13 upward revisions and 2 downward. Schedule: SolarEdge Technologies was scheduled to announce Q3 earnings results on Tuesday, November 2nd, after market close.
